mapper.select: SELECT id, course_name, course_category, course_level, course_type, start_date, duration, instructor, price, original_price, course_description, course_image, tags, enroll_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM training_courses WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY start_date ASC

SELECT id, course_name, course_category, course_level, course_type, start_date, duration, instructor, price, original_price, course_description, course_image, tags, enroll_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM training_courses ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, course_name, course_category, course_level, course_type, start_date, duration, instructor, price, original_price, course_description, course_image, tags, enroll_count, status, created_at, updated_at FROM training_courses WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO training_courses (course_name, course_category, course_level, course_type, start_date, duration, instructor, price, original_price, course_description, course_image, tags, enroll_count, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{courseName}, #{courseCategory}, #{courseLevel}, #{courseType}, #{startDate}, #{duration}, #{instructor}, #{price}, #{originalPrice}, #{courseDescription}, #{courseImage}, #{tags}, 0, 1, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE training_courses SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE training_courses SET enroll_count = enroll_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
